paper_focus.title: Enhancing the corrosion resistance of low-density steels via Al-rich oxide film formation by grain size optimization
paper_focus.research_objective: To clarify the mechanism by which grain size controls the formation of Al-rich oxide films and the resulting corrosion resistance in Fe-Mn-Al-C low-density steels, addressing the knowledge gap beyond precipitate effects.
main_process_variables: Grain boundary density (HAGBs density 0.114 to 0.019 μm/μm²)
Corrosion test medium: 3.5 wt% NaCl solution
